_doc: Per-mode betting economics. denominations = chip-coin face values available in BET AMOUNT picker. default_denomination_index seeds first-launch selection (consumed by SaveManager._seed_first_launch_defaults via init_config + balance). NOTE: max_bet is a STRUCTURAL constant (=5) tied to the 5-column paytable layout in machines.json hands[].pays — it cannot be changed via config without rebuilding paytables and FSM logic. Likewise min_bet=1 is implicit in bet-cycling logic.

big_win_thresholds._doc: Bet-normalized multiplier = payout / total_bet. BIG WIN fires when multiplier in [big_win.min, big_win.max]. HUGE WIN fires at or above huge_win.min. Disable celebration entirely via configs/features.json -> feature_flags.big_win_overlay_enabled.
